item.title: Animal charities are becoming overwhelmed with unwanted kittens because people aren’t neutering their cats. The number of kittens being abandoned has jumped as neutering rates have dropped since Covid. It’s being caused by a combination of rising vet bill
item.description: By @itvnews: Animal charities are becoming overwhelmed with unwanted kittens because people aren’t neutering their cats. The number of kittens being abandoned has jumped as neutering rates have dropped since Covid. It’s being caused by a combination of rising vet bill
